_comment: Canonical source. Bundled copy at composeApp/src/commonMain/composeResources/files/onboarding-tips.json must be kept in sync.
title: I'm your AI travel guide!
footer_text: The more you explore, the smarter I get

tips.description: to discover what makes each place special
you like — I'll learn your taste and recommend better spots
on the right to filter by what excites you
anytime — ask about hidden gems, safety, food, anything
